2026/05/22 17:00:47.452536123 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452543427 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452570577 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452571610 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452589453 {
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452590405 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452601906 new <- list()
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452602708 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452615371 new$width <- width
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452616102 if (!missing(height))

2026/05/22 17:00:47.452675524 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452676375 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452689480 new$version <- version
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452695471 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452708976 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452709797 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452722421 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452723213 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452736478 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452737249 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452753479 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452754311 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452767064 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452767856 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452784647 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452785449 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452808061 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452808933 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452823841 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452824672 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452838999 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452839790 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452854518 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452855309 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452869416 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452870157 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452890675 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452891487 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452910823 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452911634 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452927384 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452928156 "default"))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452943464 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452944306 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452957349 }
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452959833 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452989038 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/22 17:00:47.452990320 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453007242 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453008224 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453025296 }
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453026147 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453041115 }
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453042037 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453093393 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453095096 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453139218 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453140681 domain = NA)
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453157993 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453158875 }
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453173923 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453175025 old$family <- family
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453193940 }
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453194822 version <- old$version

2026/05/22 17:00:47.453258281 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453259213 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/22 17:00:47.453309306 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/22 17:00:47.453332469 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/22 17:00:47.453333521 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/05/22 17:00:47.452589453 {

2026/05/22 17:00:47.452709797 if (!missing(encoding))

2026/05/22 17:00:47.452723213 if (!missing(bg))

2026/05/22 17:00:47.452928156 "default"))

2026/05/22 17:00:47.453025296 }

2026/05/22 17:00:47.453041115 }
